structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2024-12-06 New Program: Home Start 100
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2024-12-06 16:30:26-07:00

	
		
 


New Program: Home Start 100 
NCM-P-2024-12-06

 

 

ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

We are pleased to announce the new NOVA Home Start 100 program!

 

Thank you to all who joined our Product presentation.  As promised, attached are the program guidelines and marketing collateral.

 

 

Program Highlights

*	First Time Homebuyers only
*	30-year fixed & 5/6 ARM
*	Purchase Transactions only
*	100% LTV
*	700 Fico Score
*	No Mortgage Insurance Required
*	Max Loan amount $300,000
*	Property must be in Pima County
*	Income Limits apply (110% AMI)

 

 

This program will follow the same process flow as the NOVA Doctor/Graduate program.

 

 

Rate/Payment Comparison* 

 

Program

VW NOVA Home Start 100 5/6 SOFR ARM (No MI)

VW NOVA Home Start 100 30YR Fixed (No MI)

Conventional 30Yr

HomeReady/HomePossible

FHA

FHA Forgivable 3.5% DPA

Rate

7.375%

8.375%

8.375%

8.375%

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To view previous Communications, follow this path: Novanet > Products & UW > 2024 NOVA Communication > Product
